app.title: The Book of Acts
app.tagline: Know the Word · Trust the Spirit · Preach the Name
app.errorHelp: Run {cmd} locally, or check that the Netlify build completed successfully.

panels.6: Rome — to the Ends of the Earth

scripture.chapterUnavailable: This chapter is not yet available in this language.

teaching.comingSoonBody: This pane will hold Pastor Fidele Bolton's teaching for each panel of Acts — drawn from PSOS course manuals, the {curriculum} curriculum book, sermons, and articles.
teaching.curriculumName: Know the Word | Trust the Spirit
teaching.builderStep3: This pane will populate automatically from {manifest}
teaching.noContent: No teaching content yet for this panel.

type.book-section: From: Know the Word | Trust the Spirit

timeline.hint: Click any event to jump there

pentecost.title: Pentecost
pentecost.blurb: The Spirit is poured out; 3,000 believe.

stephen-martyred.title: Stephen martyred
stephen-martyred.blurb: First Christian martyr — the church scatters.

cornelius.title: Cornelius and his household
cornelius.blurb: The gospel breaks the Jew/Gentile wall.

jerusalem-council.title: Jerusalem Council
jerusalem-council.blurb: Gentiles are saved by grace, not law.

macedonian-vision.title: Macedonian Vision
macedonian-vision.blurb: "Come over to Macedonia and help us."

areopagus-sermon.title: Areopagus Sermon
areopagus-sermon.blurb: The unknown God made known in Athens.

silversmiths-riot.title: Riot of the silversmiths
silversmiths-riot.blurb: Artemis vs. the kingdom of God.

paul-arrested.title: Paul arrested in Jerusalem
paul-arrested.blurb: The journey from freedom to chains begins.

first-jerusalem-visit.title: First Jerusalem visit
first-jerusalem-visit.blurb: Three years after Damascus — fifteen days with Peter.

famine-relief.title: Famine-relief visit
famine-relief.blurb: Antioch sends aid to Judea by Barnabas and Saul.

corinth-gallio.title: Corinth — before Gallio
corinth-gallio.blurb: The proconsul throws the case out — legal cover for the gospel.

caesarea-prison.title: Caesarea — held two years
caesarea-prison.blurb: Felix leaves Paul in chains; Festus inherits the case.

timelineView.title: The Acts Timeline
timelineView.subtitle: From Pentecost to Rome — drawn to scale, so you can see how much time passed.
timelineView.scaleNote: Taller gaps mean more time passed; dates are approximate scholarly consensus
timelineView.jumpHint: tap any event to open that chapter

prologue.heading: The first fifty days
prologue.scaleTag: counted in days — not to scale
prologue.waiting: 10 days — waiting and prayer in Jerusalem (Acts 1:14)
